---
title: "Wenjing_solution"
output: html_document
---

Plot for Q1:

```{r import_data,echo=FALSE,message=FALSE,include=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)
install.packages("jsonlite",repos = "https://cran.rstudio.com/")
library(jsonlite)
data <- fromJSON("https://huggingface.co/datasets/lukeslp/world-languages/raw/main/world_languages_integrated.json")


```


```{r reform_dataframe ,echo=FALSE,message=FALSE}
language_name <- data$name
speaker_count <- data$speaker_count$count
speaking_country<- data$speaker_count$metadata$countries
speaking_country[sapply(speaking_country,is.null)] <- NA
speaking_country <- sapply(speaking_country,function(x){if(all(is.na(x))) NA else paste(x,collapse = ", ")})
re_df <- data.frame(language_name,speaking_country,speaker_count)

```



```{r data_cleaning,echo=FALSE,message=FALSE}
language_num_in_countries <- re_df %>% 
  filter(!is.na(speaking_country)) %>%separate_rows(speaking_country,sep = ",\\s*") %>% group_by(speaking_country) %>% summarise(language_count=n_distinct(language_name)) %>% arrange(desc(language_count)) %>% head(20)



```

```{r data_visualization_Q1,echo=FALSE,message=FALSE,warning=FALSE,warning=FALSE,results='hide'}
install.packages("rnaturalearth",repos = "https://cran.rstudio.com/")
install.packages("rnaturalearthdata",repos = "https://cran.rstudio.com/")
library(rnaturalearth)

world_map <- ne_countries(scale = "small",returnclass = "sf")
map_data <- world_map %>% left_join(language_num_in_countries, by=c("name"="speaking_country") )
plot<- ggplot(data = map_data) +
    geom_sf(aes(fill = language_count), color = "red", size = 0.1) +
    scale_fill_viridis_c(name = "Number of Languages", 
                         option = "viridis", 
                         na.value = "gray",
                         direction = -1) + 
    labs(title = "Linguistic Diversity by Country",
         subtitle = "Number of languages spoken per country")
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom",
          legend.key.width = unit(2, "cm"))
          
print(plot)
```
